methods.description: Collection of 970 individuals from 34 locations across the geographical range of the Telestes genus for genetic analysis.

steps.description: A total of 970 individuals from 34 locations were collected for this study, covering almost the entire geographical range of the Telestes genus.
steps.searchable_summary: collect 970 individuals from 34 locations for genetic study

methods.description: Extraction of whole DNA from muscle or caudal fin samples and amplification of a mitochondrial DNA coding region for genetic analysis.

steps.description: Whole DNA was extracted from 25 mg of muscle or 0.25 cm2 of caudal fin using the GentraH Puregen TM Tissue Kit (QIAGEN) following the manufacturer's instructions.
steps.searchable_summary: extract DNA from muscle or fin using GentraH Puregen TM Tissue Kit

steps.description: A 1275 bp mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) coding region was amplified by PCR using the Taq CORE Kit (MP Biomedicals) with primers L14350C and H15620U.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify 1275 bp mtDNA region using PCR with specific primers

methods.description: Sequencing of amplified DNA fragments and alignment of sequences for genetic analysis.

steps.description: The amplicons were sequenced by GATC Biotech using internal primers Cb-L500 and Cb-H650.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence DNA amplicons using GATC Biotech and internal primers

steps.description: Chromatograms were checked for quality and sequences were aligned using SEQSCAPE 2.5.
steps.searchable_summary: align DNA sequences using SEQSCAPE 2.5 after quality check

methods.description: Genotyping of eleven microsatellite loci in 889 individuals for genetic analysis.

steps.description: Eleven microsatellite loci were successfully genotyped in 889 individuals using previously described primer pairs and one novel locus.
steps.searchable_summary: genotype eleven microsatellite loci in 889 individuals

steps.description: The eleven loci were amplified through four multiplex PCRs.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify eleven loci using four multiplex PCRs

steps.description: Amplicons were analyzed and allele sizes were scored using protocols and conditions described by previous studies.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze amplicons and score allele sizes

steps.description: To ensure reliability, 10% of the 889 individuals were genotyped twice, yielding identical results.
steps.searchable_summary: validate genotyping by repeating 10% of samples
